name: 15_mc_boundary_exclusive_fails
description: Boundary: prob_beating == MC_SANITY_THRESHOLD exactly. The inline producer uses `<` (strict less-than) so the boundary FAILS the MC gate -- condition fails, count resets.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -5.0 <= -1.10 is TRUE. MC: prob_beating 60.0 < MC_SANITY_THRESHOLD(60.0) is FALSE (strict less-than; equality fails). Combined: True AND False = False. Reset branch; new_count = 0; hit = False. Pinned to catch an impl that mistakenly used `<=` for the MC gate (which would let equality through and continue counting toward exit).
